title: Jon Snow’s Secret: The Truth That Changed Everything #got #shorts
description: The rebellion was built on a lie. Jon Snow was never just a bastard—he was the secret that could have changed the fate of Westeros. This is the truth behind his birth. #JonSnow #GameOfThrones #Shorts

scenes.narration: Robert’s Rebellion was built on a lie—and at its center was a child no one knew existed.
scenes.image_prompt: shadow of a child surrounded by fire and ice symbols, mysterious tone, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: The realm believed Lyanna Stark was taken, but the truth was hidden to protect something far more important.
scenes.image_prompt: Lyanna in the Tower of Joy, soft light, secretive atmosphere, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: Inside that tower, she gave birth to a son—the child of Rhaegar Targaryen and Lyanna Stark.
scenes.image_prompt: newborn wrapped in cloth, dim candlelight, emotional and intimate, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: A child of two worlds—fire and blood, ice and honor—born into a war that could not know his name.
scenes.image_prompt: symbols of Stark direwolf and Targaryen dragon merging behind a baby, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: Ned Stark found Lyanna as she died, and made a promise that would define the rest of his life.
scenes.image_prompt: Ned kneeling beside Lyanna, holding her hand, tragic and emotional, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: To protect the child, he hid the truth, raising him as his own and burying the secret from the world.
scenes.image_prompt: Ned holding baby Jon in Winterfell, solemn and protective, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: Jon Snow grew up believing he was a bastard, never knowing the legacy he carried within him.
scenes.image_prompt: young Jon standing alone in Winterfell courtyard, isolated, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: His true name, his claim, and his purpose were hidden—waiting for a time when the truth could emerge.
scenes.image_prompt: older Jon with fire and ice swirling around him, destiny imagery, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: The war that destroyed a dynasty was never about a throne—it was about protecting this one secret.
scenes.image_prompt: battlefields fading into image of Jon standing in silence, symbolic transition, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: Jon Snow was not the aftermath of the rebellion—he was the reason it mattered at all.
scenes.image_prompt: Jon standing between fire and ice, final cinematic reveal, vertical 1080x1920
